command: OPENAI_KEY=$(grep '^OPENAI_API_KEY=' /opt/p0-foundation/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && if [ -z "$OPENAI_KEY" ]; then echo 'ERROR: OPENAI_API_KEY empty in p0 .env'; exit 1; fi && if grep -q OPENAI_API_KEY /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Already exists, updating...'; sed -i '/^OPENAI_API_KEY=/d' /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env; fi && echo "OPENAI_API_KEY=$OPENAI_KEY" >> /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env && echo 'OK: OPENAI_API_KEY added to claude.env' && echo '--- Verify ---' && grep -c OPENAI_API_KEY /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env && echo 'Lines with OPENAI_API_KEY in claude.env' && echo '--- PG_URL check ---' && grep -c PG_URL /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env 2>/dev/null && echo 'PG_URL exists' || echo 'PG_URL missing — adding...' && if ! grep -q PG_URL /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env 2>/dev/null; then PG_PASS=$(grep '^POSTGRES_PASSWORD=' /opt/p0-foundation/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo "PG_URL=postgresql://n8n:${PG_PASS}@127.0.0.1:5432/vector_memory" >> /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env; echo 'PG_URL added'; fi && echo '=== Final claude.env keys ===' && grep -oP '^[A-Z_]+(?==)' /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env
intent: add OPENAI_API_KEY and PG_URL to claude.env for vector MCP server
